summary: Bug fix verification complete for Mira Pet Life Operating System. All 3 reported bugs have been fixed and verified: (1) AI correctly identifies 'dog walker' requests as CARE pillar without mixing celebrate flow, (2) Member Inbox loads notifications correctly - NOT blank/empty, (3) Picks panel creates service tickets. Backend tests: 9/10 passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright automation.

issues: WebSocket connection errors showing in console (non-blocking)
404 errors for some resources in console

passed_tests: AI Context Switching - Dog Walker detected as CARE pillar
AI Context Switching - Birthday party stays in CELEBRATE pillar
Concierge picks request endpoint creates tickets

bug_1_ai_dog_walker.issue: AI giving nonsensical response when asking 'I need a dog walker for next week' - mixing in celebration flow responses
bug_1_ai_dog_walker.evidence: Backend test confirms pillar detected as 'care', Frontend inbox shows 'dog walker' requests categorized under Care pillar, not Celebrate

bug_2_inbox_blank.evidence: Frontend shows Inbox with 6 unread notifications, multiple notification items visible, tabs (Primary/Updates/All) working

bug_3_picks_service_tickets.issue: Picks panel 'Create for Pet' button creates service tickets
bug_3_picks_service_tickets.evidence: Backend API /api/concierge/picks-request returns 200, Frontend shows Open Requests with multiple Pick Requests

critical_code_review_comments: celebrate flow context switching fix at mira_routes.py line 14245 is working correctly - detects switch intent keywords like 'dog walker', 'walker', 'walking' and clears celebrate_stage when user switches context
member notifications inbox endpoint at server.py line 14588 working correctly with proper query filtering for archived/category/pet filters
seed_data_creation: None needed - test pet Mystique already exists
